odoo-brl.notes: BRL engine: chunked 4-way classify (double-profile check_module_exists) + deterministic cost (cost-config.json) + RTM deliverables. Phase 0 bootstrap uses profile_inspect(summary) for profile composition; Phase C uses impact_analysis to ground Extension-M/L tier in real blast radius. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-addon-diff.notes: CE/EE/distribution diff is profile-scoped: pin profile (set_active_profile) + profile_inspect(repos) to know each profile's real repo coverage; entity_lookup attributes a field's source module (CE vs EE). min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-campaign-plan.notes: Standalone-first. OSM tools optional for feature claim grounding only; profile_inspect verifies a 'competitive displacement' angle against the real platform inventory.

odoo-capability-proof.notes: module_inspect(summary) adds architecture scope (N models/views) to the proof package beyond field-level evidence; profile_inspect(repos) grounds index coverage (absence-in-index transparency); describe_module attributes module identity (author/shortdesc). min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-competitive-brief.notes: Standalone-first. profile_inspect turns the capability matrix's 'your platform' column from training-data assertion into indexed fact. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-content-draft.notes: Standalone-first. OSM tools optional for grounding feature claims in content.

odoo-customization-inventory.notes: profile_inspect(modules) enumerates the profile's modules in one call (Round 0); module_inspect(dependencies) + find_deprecated_usage ground upgrade-risk in real dependency graph + deprecated-API scan. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-deal-followup.notes: Standalone-first. check_module_exists optional - only when user requests feature fact-check.

odoo-demo-recording.notes: Standalone-first. OSM optional - only to plan the demo click path; video capture is browser-MCP side. set_active_version pins the target version so view/URL paths are not resolved against latest-indexed.

odoo-deploy-checklist.notes: Domain 5 grounds CLI flags for the target version via cli_help (was instructed in SKILL.md but undeclared).

odoo-deprecation-audit.notes: set_active_profile scopes find_deprecated_usage(profile_name) to the customer's modules instead of default Odoo CE scope. test_base_classes detects deprecated test base class usage (SavepointCase v8-v15 alias); js_test_inspect surfaces deprecated QUnit patterns in v18+ modules. min_server 0.15.0 for test tools.

odoo-discovery-summary.notes: Standalone-first. profile_inspect(modules) verifies profile-owned modules in one call (Round 3.5), upgrading Confidence-Low rows. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-feature-check.notes: profile_inspect(repos) grounds index coverage (absence-in-index transparency); describe_module attributes module identity (author/shortdesc). min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-feature-highlights.notes: module_inspect(summary) gives concrete architecture numbers (N models/views) for marketing copy.

odoo-frontend-design.notes: Knowledge-only design-quality skill (leaf, no agent spawn): the senior-frontend-designer expertise that odoo-solution-design (architect) and odoo-coding (coder) LOAD for the UI/UX of a change, and the quality bar odoo-ui-review rates against. resolve_stylesheet + find_style_override ground design decisions in the target version's real theme tokens; it points to skills/_shared/odoo-frontend-fidelity.md as the SSOT for the verification mechanics rather than restating them. min_server 0.7.0 for the stylesheet tools.

odoo-gap-analysis.notes: module_inspect distinguishes Configuration vs Extension via view/JS inventory, not just the field list; profile_inspect(repos) grounds index coverage (absence-in-index transparency); describe_module attributes module identity (author/shortdesc). min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-git-rebase.notes: Same-series rebase orchestrator (pure delegation): subagents read diffs + compare behavior; model_inspect/entity_lookup ground replayed symbols at the NEW BASE HEAD to catch rename/move/already-present absorption failures git does not flag; find_override_point checks refactored override points; test tools ground test-survival at the shared series. No cross-version api_version_diff (same series). min_server 0.15.0 for test tools.

odoo-objection-handling.notes: module_inspect(summary) strengthens the ACA Counter table with module scope numbers.

odoo-onboarding.notes: After profile selection, profile_inspect(modules) records the real module inventory into .odoo-ai/context.md so downstream skills need not re-derive it. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-override-finding.notes: lookup_core_api + api_version_diff verify a method's API stability / signature change from the index; find_examples grounds the override template in real indexed code instead of training memory.

odoo-solution-design.notes: Slim SKILL.md for the design bundle - companion to the odoo-solution-architect agent. Designs the technical solution (approach / data model / override strategy / module structure) before any code is written. impact_analysis grounds blast-radius in Risks; find_override_point grounds super() position; validate_* verify the proposed ORM chains so the coder inherits a verified design. test_base_classes/find_test_examples/tests_covering/test_coverage_audit ground test outline in real test surface (PR #323, v0.15.0). min_server 0.15.0 for test tools.

odoo-planning.notes: Slim SKILL.md for the planning bundle - companion to the odoo-planner agent. Turns an APPROVED design DAG into the 3-block EXECUTION PLAN (wave-batched module-DAG + integration cadence + module/stage->skill wiring + full lifecycle), conforming to plan-mode-schema.md; it does NOT serialize run-<id>.json (intake Phase P owns that). Stays LIGHT on tools: set_active_version pins the series (also a reachability probe); module_inspect(dependencies) + check_module_exists trust-but-verify that the modules the design DAG names exist and their dependency edges hold before batching into waves - the planner CONSUMES the design DAG by pointer, it does not re-derive it. min_server 0.6.0.

odoo-pr-monitoring.notes: Post-PR lifecycle owner (poller; NOT a blocking DAG node). Stays LIGHT on tools - it makes essentially no OSM calls: all PR/CI/review reads + the merge are GitHub-API ops delegated to git-toolkit's github-operator, post-merge cleanup is delegated to git-operator, and deep source grounding happens INSIDE the odoo-debug / odoo-coding it routes to. set_active_version pins the run's target Odoo series once at attach (doubling as the OSM reachability probe) so the version-pinned context travels with any D3 hand-off to odoo-debug and into the merge report. Writes only its own poll-state under .odoo-ai/pr-monitoring/ (gitignored); the PR URL lives in run-<id>.json (run-harness owns that write) so a fresh session can re-attach to the watch. min_server 0.6.0 for set_active_version.

odoo-risk-overview.notes: profile_inspect(modules) auto-enumerates the in-scope modules in Round 0. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-intake.notes: Pure text routing and brainstorm - no MCP tool calls. Tool names mentioned in routing table discriminators are references to OTHER skills' tools, not invocations by intake itself.

odoo-wave.notes: Internal git-executor (consume-only; user-invocable=false) - no MCP tools of its own; INVOKES odoo-coding per WI over per-WI worktrees + cherry-pick + end-of-wave odoo-code-review + squash, then STOPS at the L2-squash-gate (merge owned by odoo-pr-monitoring). Outputs to .odoo-ai/wave/ (gitignored).

odoo-ui-review.notes: Rendered-UI review (aesthetics/functional/stability/a11y/performance). Browser MCP (chrome-devtools) captures the live screen; OSM grounds findings in code. find_examples shows how a given view type is typically structured (Step 1b screen-shape recon); impact_analysis maps the template/asset-bundle inheritance blast radius so a finding names what a fix could break elsewhere. Tool list synced to companion agent agents/odoo-ui-reviewer.md. find_examples (v0.1.0) + impact_analysis (v0.1.0) are core tools below the 0.7.0 stylesheet floor, so the floor is unchanged.

odoo-version-diff.notes: find_examples grounds Added-API descriptions in real indexed usage.

odoo-visual-regression.notes: Screenshot baseline + diff between two states/builds. OSM scopes the comparison via blast radius; browser MCP captures and diffs. resolve_stylesheet adds the @import-chain blast radius; set_active_version pins the target version.

odoo-support-triage.notes: Composition skill - no MCP tools called directly. NL-dispatches to odoo-debug (bug path) and odoo-feature-check (feature-request path) via description-match. All outputs to .odoo-ai/support/ (gitignored, confidentiality-safe).

odoo-qa-suite.notes: Phase 1 grounds test mechanics (test class, tag syntax, --test-enable/--test-tags) via OSM set_active_version + cli_help for the target version; Phase 2 NL-dispatches to odoo-deploy-checklist. Outputs to .odoo-ai/qa/.

run-harness.notes: Drive-to-done loop: walks the RUN-DAG in .odoo-ai/run-<id>.json, dispatches each node, reads its Continuation Contract, advances to DONE/BLOCKED/NEEDS_CONTEXT. Pure orchestration - no MCP tools of its own.

odoo-test-writing.notes: Writes executable Odoo test files (TransactionCase/Form or Hoot/QUnit per version); tests protect business behavior, not current code. test_base_classes resolves the correct base class + cr.commit()-forbidden contract per version (incl. HttpCase for tour/url_open); test_class_inspect resolves an extended test-helper's base chain + cursor contract (Round 2); find_test_examples returns test-only chunks (no production contamination) for the grounded pattern; js_test_inspect confirms the per-module JS framework mix (QUnit vs Hoot) + suite paths + tour registry before any JS/tour test is emitted. tests_covering + test_coverage_audit establish the anti-reinvention coverage baseline (Round 2.5); model_inspect/resolve_orm_chain/validate_relation/validate_depends ground field names + relational chains + @api.depends paths (Rounds 2/5); api_version_diff grounds the adapt-mode (forward-port) renamed/removed-API mapping. min_server 0.15.0 for the test-surface tools (tests_covering/test_coverage_audit/test_class_inspect).

odoo-security-audit.notes: Audits Odoo code for security issues (SQLi/XSS/access-control/CSRF/deserialization/secrets); graded findings report, no fix.

odoo-data-migration.notes: Writes Odoo pre/post-migration scripts + verification plan; does NOT execute against an instance (that is a separate human-gated deploy step).

odoo-perf-audit.notes: Audits Odoo code for performance anti-patterns (N+1, missing prefetch, unindexed domains, compute thrash); findings + remediation.

odoo-pricing-proposal.notes: Builds a customer-facing pricing proposal (license tier + implementation cost bands + SLA + terms); rate numbers are AE-filled placeholders, not hardcoded.

odoo-rfp-response.notes: Rates Odoo compliance per RFP requirement into a Yes/Partial/Roadmap/No matrix with evidence + executive fit summary; module_inspect adds view/flow coverage to distinguish Yes vs Partial; profile_inspect(repos) grounds index coverage (absence-in-index transparency); describe_module attributes module identity; suggest_pattern backs the No path. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-customer-health.notes: Assesses an existing Odoo customer's health (score + churn risk + upsell + next-touch) for customer-success/retention.

odoo-debug.notes: Front-door debug orchestrator. Stays light on tools - pins version + quick layer classification, then dispatches specialist debug agents (odoo-backend-debugger OSM-only; odoo-ui-debugger browser, serial-exclusive). Heavy OSM localization happens inside the agents. test_base_classes checks for cr.commit() misuse in test context; tests_covering locates existing tests covering the failing model. Writes run notes to .odoo-ai/debug/ (gitignored). min_server 0.15.0 for test tools.

odoo-forward-port.notes: Forward-port orchestrator: api_version_diff grounds version-boundary breaks and outcome classification; model_inspect/entity_lookup verify symbol survival at target to catch autosilent field breaks; find_override_point assists in locating insertion points during adapt phase. test_base_classes/find_test_examples/tests_covering/test_coverage_audit ground test verification at target version (PR #323, v0.15.0). min_server 0.15.0 for test tools.

odoo-i18n.notes: Spawner: dispatches odoo-translator for .pot/.po via odoo-bin+polib; OSM only for version flags. cli_help grounds the per-series CLI surface - the --i18n-export/--load-language/-u reload server flags (v8-v18) vs the odoo-bin i18n subcommand (loadlang/export/import, v19+); --load-language loads the language into the DB so an existing translation re-exports with msgstr (distinct from --language/-l which only selects the file). entity_lookup confirms a field's canonical string label for glossary alignment. There is no OSM i18n tool - export/merge/validate are shell odoo-bin + polib in the leaf agent.

odoo-doc-illustration.notes: Spawner: dispatches odoo-user-doc-writer (userguide RST) and odoo-marketing-writer (App-Store landing HTML) per DOC LAYER; pre-fetches copy from odoo-content-draft on the marketing path; scoped via odoo-doc-scoper; scheduled via odoo-doc-planner.

odoo-instance.notes: Spawner: dispatches odoo-instance-ops agent for instance lifecycle (create/drop/init/update/test). cli_help grounds per-version odoo-bin CLI flags; set_active_version pins the target series for OSM calls; list_available_versions lets the skill discover indexed versions when the user specifies a vague target.

odoo-modules-upgrade.notes: Cross-major cluster upgrade orchestrator (full delegation; CODE-LEVEL, no data migration): validate_depends + module_inspect(dependencies) build the topo DAG; subagents compare custom-vs-core and adapt; reuses odoo-deprecation-audit + odoo-version-diff (recon), odoo-gap-analysis (core-absorption), odoo-coding (adapt), odoo-instance (install/test), and the plugin review capability (PR). Module wholly absorbed -> delete + record reason. cli_help grounds per-target odoo-bin flags. min_server 0.15.0.

odoo-acceptance.notes: Acceptance orchestrator (spawner-agent) - stays light on tools: set_active_version pins the series once (also a reachability probe) and impact_analysis grounds the Phase 0 verify-scope manifest via reverse-closure blast radius. Phase 0 also calls module_inspect(dependencies) + model_inspect(views) (via acceptance-scope.md) to enumerate the affected screens before the planner runs. Deep structural grounding happens inside the dispatched agents (odoo-qa-planner / odoo-qa-tester), not here; live execution runs against a real instance + browser MCP (not OSM). min_server 0.6.0 for set_active_version (impact_analysis 0.1.0, module_inspect/model_inspect 0.5.0 in the surface).

odoo-icon-design.notes: Spawner: dispatches odoo-icon-designer to design and generate the module identity icon (icon.png / icon.svg on v19). Standalone-first; OSM optional for category/version grounding. Browser-free; no live instance required. min_server 0.13.1 for describe_module.

odoo-doc-feature-map.notes: Spawner: dispatches odoo-feature-cataloger to enumerate all features/capabilities a module ships for documentation purposes. Standalone-first; browser-free. OSM for module capability enumeration (describe_module + module_inspect + model_inspect). min_server 0.13.1 for describe_module.

odoo-doc-walkthrough.notes: Spawner: dispatches odoo-doc-scenarist to author happy-path usage scenarios for module documentation. Standalone-first; browser-free (scenarios authored without a live instance). OSM for grounding scenario steps in real UI labels/views. min_server 0.6.0 for set_active_version.

odoo-diff-comparator.notes: Read-only diff-range comparator: reads a whole-cluster or per-module git diff and emits a structured nghiệp vụ / intent / expected-outcome / acceptance-criteria comparison between two branches (rebase) or between a custom module and new-version core (upgrade). Writes only its findings file; no further spawn. Reused by odoo-git-rebase (P3 cluster comparison + P10 verify) and odoo-modules-upgrade (P2 core-absorption).

odoo-user-doc-writer.notes: End-user guide writer: browser-exclusive leaf agent dispatched by odoo-doc-illustration; captures userguide screenshots + assembles doc/index.rst (and per-locale variants); audience = end user, task-guidance tone; never spawns. OSM grounds UI labels via model_inspect.

odoo-marketing-writer.notes: App-Store landing writer: browser-exclusive leaf agent dispatched by odoo-doc-illustration; captures hero/feature-grid screenshots + assembles static/description/index.html (and per-locale variants) from supplied marketing copy + feature-catalog.jsonl + app-store-template.md; wires manifest images + store-keys audit; never spawns. describe_module for manifest summary. min_server 0.13.1.

odoo-gap-analyzer.notes: Gap-analysis leaf worker: dispatched by the odoo-gap-analysis skill (one per requirement cluster) to classify Configuration vs Extension and ground coverage in OSM; mirrors the skill's tool set. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-installable-prober.notes: Read-only forward-port pipeline leaf: probes the target-series installable state for a single module via module_inspect(summary, odoo_version) before cherry-pick / merge. Falls back to direct file read when OSM misses. No writes, no further spawns.

odoo-instance-ops.notes: Instance lifecycle leaf agent: learns per-version odoo-bin CLI flags at runtime via cli_help; set_active_version pins the target series; list_available_versions used for version resolution when target is vague. Does NOT call OSM for code-structure queries - only for CLI surface discovery.

odoo-qa-planner.notes: Acceptance oracle author (leaf, no spawn): set_active_version pins the series, then model_inspect / entity_lookup / module_inspect confirm that the fields, views, labels, state values, and role groups its scenarios reference actually EXIST for the version. OSM is STATIC - used only to keep the oracle well-formed, NEVER to infer the business expected (that comes from the requirement). min_server 0.6.0 for set_active_version.

odoo-qa-tester.notes: Live acceptance executor (leaf, no spawn): set_active_version pins the series, then model_inspect / entity_lookup confirm a screen's real fields/views/labels/state values before driving it. OSM is STATIC structural grounding only; live record values come from the running instance + browser MCP (and a live Odoo MCP exposing read_record/search_records), not OSM. min_server 0.6.0 for set_active_version.

odoo-icon-designer.notes: Icon design leaf agent: generates module identity icon as SVG then rasterizes to PNG; version-gated emit (PNG-only v8-v18; +icon.svg+manifest key on v19); style-era-aware (skeuo v8-v10, flat v11-v16, flat-shadow v17-v19); standalone-first, browser-free. OSM optional for category/version grounding. min_server 0.13.1 for describe_module.

odoo-feature-cataloger.notes: Feature-inventory leaf agent: enumerates all capabilities a module ships for documentation. Browser-free; standalone-first. OSM-primary (describe_module + module_inspect + model_inspect); disk fallback for ACL/security. Produces feature-catalog.jsonl + feature-catalog.md. min_server 0.13.1 for describe_module.

odoo-doc-scenarist.notes: Doc-scenario leaf agent: authors happy-path usage scenarios (narrative + structured steps[]) for module documentation. Browser-free; standalone-first; NOT bound by acceptance-oracle-contract.md. OSM for grounding scenario steps in real UI labels/views. Produces walkthrough.jsonl + walkthrough.md. min_server 0.6.0.

odoo-doc-scoper.notes: Multi-module scope mapper (mirrors odoo-review-scoper pattern): walks manifests under TARGET, enumerates modules, resolves languages (D6 6-tier + disk-union), detects doc_layer capability, records has_demo. Emits a scope block + modules[] list. Read-only on source; writes only scope block file. min_server 0.13.1 for describe_module.

odoo-doc-planner.notes: reuses _shared/doc-cluster-plan.md; standalone-first, OSM optional; writes doc-plan.yaml

orchestration._doc: SSOT (single source of truth) for orchestration metadata of every skills/<dir>. Consumed by gen_surface.py -> docs/reference/ORCHESTRATION-MAP.md + orchestration-digest.txt, and validated by check_orchestration.py. spawn_class: leaf (runs inline) | orchestrator-nl (chains other skills via natural-language dispatch, no subagent spawn) | spawner-agent (dispatches a named subagent) | spawner-wave (worktree fan-out with parallel subagents). stack: backend | frontend | fullstack | none (drives backend<->frontend routing). instance_touching: true when the skill emits odoo-bin / builds or updates an instance (must ground CLI via OSM cli_help per target version). output_mode: chat-only (emits to chat, skip Plan Mode) | writes-files (persists file artifact, requires Plan Mode); SSOT here, replaces hardcoded chat-only lists. default_gate_tier: L0 (read-only/chat auto-pass) | L1 (writes .odoo-ai/ internal, auto-pass under --auto) | L2 (irreversible/outward: instance_touching or spawner-wave - ALWAYS human gate; dial cannot lower). Per-node override lives in run-<id>.json, not here. handoff: Context-Handoff Protocol tier for resuming subagents across turns. send-message (Tier-A: lead resumes a named worker via SendMessage, avoiding cold-spawn overhead) | fork (Tier-B: subagent_type=fork fan-out inheriting parent context + prompt cache) | fresh (Tier-C default: cold-spawn every turn via Agent tool + worklog blackboard - the always-correct baseline). Absence of the field is treated as fresh by the lint rule; only declare when the skill is wired for Tier-A or Tier-B in snippets/context-handoff-protocol.md.

spawns: (Phase R: ≤2 read-only recon agents - Explore or specialist in read-only mode; no writes, no further spawn)

(anonymous read-only fan-out subagents, explicit model per phase haiku/sonnet/opus; read-only on Odoo source, write only findings under .odoo-ai/survey/, no further spawn - see skills/_shared/concurrency-guard.md Mode B)
(conditional DAG workers when >10 large clusters)
odoo-coder
odoo-frontend-coder
(dispatch: model-weighted subagent batches, explicit model per work-item per tier table haiku/sonnet/opus/fable - see skills/_shared/concurrency-guard.md Mode B)
odoo-code-reviewer
odoo-review-scoper
git-ops (PR worktree checkout + diff/branch read + inline-comment posting on the PR - via git-ops skill - git-toolkit)
odoo-gap-analyzer (one per requirement cluster; model per complexity per concurrency-guard Model-tier selection)
intake subagent (sonnet: NL -> structured refs/base, PR-resolve, worktree-not-switch)
Explore (read-only range enumerate + diff read)
odoo-intent-extractor (rebase MODE, per-commit, base-head grounding)
odoo-diff-comparator (cluster behavior comparison + range-diff/dup-guard verify)
odoo-coding skill (via Skill tool: P8 conflict resolution + adapt; owns odoo-coder/odoo-frontend-coder fan-out and synthesis - the rebase does NOT dispatch raw coders for conflicts)
odoo-code-review skill (via Skill tool: P9b in-pipeline review + P12 final PR review)
odoo-test-writing (mode adapt, RED-first)

odoo-instance skill (CONDITIONAL at P10: provisions ONE instance when range touches DB-stateful behavior; its INSTANCE_HANDLE is forwarded to every downstream verify/coder brief - downstream never self-provisions)
git-ops (all local git mutations - cherry-pick, branch, squash, force-with-lease - plus read-only diff/range analysis + tree-identity verify and PR create/review - via git-ops skill - git-toolkit)
odoo-solution-architect
(dispatch: single mode -> 1 architect call; master-child mode -> 1 master architect + N child architects in dag_layer order - see snippets/master-child-design-contract.md)
odoo-planner
odoo-doc-planner
(dispatch: single planner by default; for very large scope fan out one planner per module cluster following concurrency-guard.md Mode B, then reconcile - handoff fresh)
git-ops (read PR CI status + review state, MERGE at the L2-merge-gate, re-push of an approved D3 fix + post-merge cleanup of worktrees/branches/tag - via git-ops skill - git-toolkit)
odoo-debug (D3: route ANY CI warning/error/fail for root-cause first, via Skill tool)
odoo-coding (author the fix odoo-debug located, via Skill tool; the re-push stays human-gated X2)
odoo-doc-scoper (pre-flight multi-module scope mapper; dispatched first on multi-module TARGET)
odoo-doc-planner (dependency-aware doc scheduler; dispatched after scoper; emits doc-plan.yaml; one whole-plan gate; branch-aware per-instance incremental loop)
odoo-user-doc-writer (browser-exclusive leaf; end-user guide doc/index.rst; dispatched per module per DOC LAYER userguide|both)
odoo-marketing-writer (browser-exclusive leaf; App-Store landing static/description/index.html; dispatched per module per DOC LAYER appstore|both)
odoo-content-draft (Skill tool - marketing copy pre-fetch on marketing path when copy not supplied)
odoo-ui-reviewer
odoo-coding (INVOKED per WI via the Skill tool from the orchestrating context; odoo-coding owns coder count + model)

git-ops (worktree add, cherry-pick onto integration in module-DAG order, squash, force-with-lease, read-only diff + tree-identity verify, open PR integration->principal; merge owned by odoo-pr-monitoring - via git-ops skill - git-toolkit)
odoo-backend-debugger
odoo-ui-debugger
odoo-intent-extractor (read-only per-commit; model per complexity)
odoo-installable-prober (read-only per-module installable-state probe in P2; model per complexity / sonnet)
odoo-coder / odoo-frontend-coder (FP-enriched adapter prompt carries C1 no-manifest-bump, C2 migration-dir series-retarget, C3 fix-old-version-first; serial per commit via work-tier worktrees)
git-ops (cherry-pick, merge, branch/worktree ops - all local git mutations - plus read-only diff/range map + P5 verify and PR create/review - via git-ops skill - git-toolkit)
odoo-translator
odoo-instance-ops
intake subagent (sonnet: branch->series->profile, installable:False candidate detection, scope clarify)
Explore (dependency-graph build + diff read)
odoo-deprecation-audit + odoo-version-diff (P1 recon, NL/Skill dispatch)
odoo-diff-comparator (per-module core-absorption comparison)
odoo-gap-analysis (core-feature coverage)
odoo-solution-architect (conditional hard-call design)
odoo-coder / odoo-frontend-coder (P4 adapt, dep order, per-module worktrees)
odoo-instance-ops (P5 install/test) + odoo-backend-debugger / odoo-ui-debugger (failure diagnose)
git-ops (branch, worktree, cherry-pick, squash - all git mutations - plus read-only diff scope + verify and P7 PR review/creation - via git-ops skill - git-toolkit)
odoo-qa-planner (P1 independent-oracle author)
odoo-qa-tester (P2b live execute + adjudicate; browser-serial, one at a time)
odoo-ui-reviewer (optional per-screen quality verdict in the P2b serial slot)
odoo-test-writing (P2a durable tour/HttpCase channel, via Skill tool)
odoo-instance (P2 provision the co-installed cluster + run durable tests, via Skill tool)
odoo-debug / odoo-coding (P3 fix-loop on FAIL, via Skill tool)
odoo-icon-designer
odoo-feature-cataloger
odoo-doc-scenarist
